expectations.evidence: Baseline does not use the standardized template. Instead creates a custom 8-section prompt with its own structure (The Real Workflow, Data Quality, Statistical Thinking, Tool Mastery, Communication, Career, Failure Museum, Advanced Topics).
The baseline prompt covers data analysis broadly across multiple dimensions, though not in the synthesized DOMAIN format.
No explicit GOAL synthesis. The prompt addresses general learning without tailoring to a specific situation or role.
N/A — baseline does not use the template at all.
